body.title: [sprint] Consequence check: constraints as first-class citizens (2026-06-14)
body.description:
**What changed:** Constraints added as first-class palace nodes; audit-design checks for blackout paths; /sorted requires cost-impact field for dispatch designs.

**Predicted unintended effects:** (1) audit-design AMEND rate rises sharply on existing designs — may feel like friction rather than safety; (2) constraint nodes go stale as operational reality changes (budget plan changes, new sources available); (3) burn rate monitor gives false confidence if cache is stale; (4) 'blackout path' keyword matching too broad — flags benign dispatch patterns; (5) cost-impact field skipped when authors don't recognize trigger keywords

**Signals to watch:** audit-design AMEND rate on sprint tickets (should rise then stabilize); zero unplanned CC blackouts after ship date; constraint nodes have updated_at within 7 days

**Gate condition:** Check by 2026-06-14 or after 10 designs pass through the new audit-design check.

**Affected files:** None — observation only
**Design rules:** none apply
**Scope boundary:** Observe; annotate occurred/clear/partial; close
**Completion criteria:** predicted effects annotated and ticket closed
